Recommendation

GPT Image 1 delivered the strongest overall performance, achieving both the highest average evaluation score (4.25/5) and the highest participant preference (9 out of 25 votes). While other models performed well in specific aspects, combining quantitative scores with qualitative human feedback provides a more complete assessment for model selection.
